note: Switchable on-device ASR packages. Each = a FastConformer (tract int4, streaming greedy for live captions) + optional Vosk second-pass rescore (utterance-end, keyword-accurate) via shenava-ctc-beam. All offline. App downloads a package on demand and picks the most capable one the device can run.

targets: DEV MODE ONLY — too weak to ship naked
DEV MODE ONLY — too weak to ship naked

packages.dominated_by: rizeh-vosk-small (137MB, ess 12.3 — far smaller AND better)

production_policy.quality_floor: Rizeh (32M) and Pizeh (6.9M) are too weak to ship NAKED (ess 18 / 38) — they only ship WITH a Vosk second pass (small or big). Only Koochik (114M) is accurate enough to go solo (koochik-stream). The two stream-only small packages (pizeh-stream, rizeh-stream) are therefore dev_only:true — hidden from production selection.
production_policy.dev_mode: A dev toggle unlocks dev_only packages (all 9) for testing/debugging. Off by default in shipped apps.
production_policy.weakest_shippable: pizeh-vosk-small (111MB) — the smallest PRODUCTION package. Devices that cannot hold even Vosk-small are not served in production (by design).

selection_policy.rule: Consider packages with dev_only!=true (unless dev mode is on). Pick the LOWEST ess_kw (best keyword accuracy) whose requires.min_ram_mb <= device_ram, min_storage_mb <= storage, total_mb <= download_budget; prefer pareto_optimal. Live captions always stream greedy (low latency); the Vosk rescore fires on utterance-end.
selection_policy.fallback: pizeh-vosk-small (111MB) — smallest production package. (In dev mode: pizeh-stream 14MB.)
selection_policy.accuracy_note: ess_kw = compound-fair keyword band (importance>=0.8) from the offline double-benchmark; streaming greedy runs slightly higher, the Vosk rescore reaches these.
selection_policy.dominated_note: pizeh-vosk-big & rizeh-vosk-big remain Pareto-dominated (koochik-vosk-* is smaller AND better keywords, since Vosk-big's 2.6GB dwarfs the encoder) — kept for completeness, deprioritized in selection.
